allow:
Bash(cd /Users/bianders/.claude/commands && \\
  mv kickoff_interview.md sdd-1-kickoff.md && \\
  mv design_review.md sdd-1c-review.md && \\
  mv adversarial_review.md sdd-2-adversarial.md && \\
  mv plan_generation.md sdd-3-plan.md && \\
  mv executing.md sdd-4-execute.md && \\
  mv wrap_up_adr.md sdd-5a-adr.md && \\
  mv wrap_up_claude_md.md sdd-5b-claude-md.md && \\
  ls sdd-*)

Bash(mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/kickoff_interview.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-1-kickoff.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/design_review.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-1c-review.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/adversarial_review.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-2-adversarial.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/plan_generation.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-3-plan.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/executing.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-4-execute.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/wrap_up_adr.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-5a-adr.md && \\
mv /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/wrap_up_claude_md.md /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-5b-claude-md.md)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh kickoff_interview/sdd-state.sh sdd-1-kickoff/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-1-kickoff.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh design_review/sdd-state.sh sdd-1c-review/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-1c-review.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh adversarial_review/sdd-state.sh sdd-2-adversarial/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-2-adversarial.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh plan_generation/sdd-state.sh sdd-3-plan/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-3-plan.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh executing/sdd-state.sh sdd-4-execute/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-4-execute.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh wrap_up_adr/sdd-state.sh sdd-5a-adr/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-5a-adr.md && \\
sed -i '' 's/sdd-state.sh wrap_up_claude_md/sdd-state.sh sdd-5b-claude-md/' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-5b-claude-md.md && \\
grep -h 'sdd-state.sh' /Users/bianders/.claude/commands/sdd-*.md)
Bash(PGPASSWORD="$POSTGRES_PASSWORD" psql -h localhost -U postgres -d outlook_email -c "SELECT message_id FROM emails WHERE subject LIKE '%Potential Licensing Partnership%' LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD="$POSTGRES_PASSWORD" psql -h caruana.local -U postgres -d outlook_email -c "SELECT message_id FROM emails WHERE subject LIKE '%Potential Licensing Partnership%' LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD="$POSTGRES_PASSWORD" psql -h caruana.local -U postgres -d outlook_email -c "SELECT message_id FROM emails WHERE subject LIKE '%Potential Licensing Partnership%' AND folder = 'sent' LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)
